titleStmt.title: SII 9.245: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 245. (A.R. No. 289 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT CHATNAHALLI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated the 9th year of the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva, Kshaya, Jyēshṭha, śu. 13, (mistake for 15) Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1146 May 27, Monday, when there was a lunar eclipse. The king's feudatory Jagadēkamalla-Vīrapāṇḍyadēva, who was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirty two-thousand, is said to have granted, at the request of the Daṇḍanāyaka Ajēya-Rāya-Pāṇḍyadēva, some land for the service of the god Noyyēśvara consecrated at Mākeṟe by the latter who was ruling over Uchchaṅgi. Some more land was granted for the purpose of feeding sixteen Brāhmans in the satra of the temple by the same Pāṇḍya chief for the beatitude of Rāya-Pāṇḍya and his queen Sōvaladēvī. The āchārya of the temple of Kalidēva of Kallakeṟe, viz., Gōṇiya-Jīya, is also said to have made a gift of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
viśuddhajñānadēhāya trivēdīdivyacakṣuṣē . śrēyaḥprāptinimittāya namassōmārddha
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabha
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakrava
rtti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . v® . Aridhātrīpaticōḷagūrjjaracamūvārā
śiyoḷu bāhumandaramanthakriyeyinde puṭṭida karīṁdra śrīṇiyaṁ lakṣmiyaṁ turagā
maneydekoṇḍu jagadoḷvikhyātiyaṁ tāḷdidaṁ sthiratējaṁ jagadēkamallavesariṁ cāḷukyaca
krēśvara . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijaku
ḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍa paricchēdigaṇḍa rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamallapādā
bjabhṛṁgaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvaraṁ vīrapāṇḍya
dēvarasaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipā
ḷanadiṁdāḷdu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . Eṇisalkārppannarārintagaṇita mahi
maṁ mānavabrātamīdhāriṇiyoḷ nānāvinōdaṁgaḷa racaneyinaudāryyadiṁ śauryya
diṁ sadguṇadiṁ saujanyadiṁ sauṁdarateyinatigāṁbhīryadiṁ dhairyadinneṇeyārī vīrapā
ṇḍyakṣitipatige samastōrvviyoḷu bhūmipāḷaru . tatpādapadmōpajīvi .
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānamaccaṁgināḍāḷva daṁḍanāyakaru
Anādiyagrahāraṁ mākeṟeya mūlasthānada dēgulavaṁ māḍisi noyyēśva
radēvara pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi yā dēvara snānanivēdyacaitrapavitrakkaṁ Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōga
kkaṁ nandādīvigegaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ pātrapāvuḷakkaṁ pūjāriya grāsakkaṁ giri
durgavuccaṁgiya kōṭeya dakṣiṇabhāgada Aṟeyakeṟeya keḷagaṇa nīrmmaṁṇu
ḷḷa kuṁbāṟageṟeya keḷagaṇa nīrmmaṇnuḷḷanitu gaddeyumaṁ Aṟeyakeṟeya teṁkalu beddale
mattarāṟumaṁ kuṁbāṟageṟeya mūḍaṇahāḷa beddale mattaru hattumaṁ . ba
ḍagiyakeṟeya keḷagaṇa nīrmmaṇnuḷḷanitu gaddeyumaṁ Ā keṟeya baḍagaṇa kōḍiya
nālku mattaṟu beddaleyumaṁ cāḷukyapratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallavarṣada 9 ne
ya kṣayasaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha śuddha 13 sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇa viṣusaṁkra
maṇa vyatīpātanimityavāgi śrīmajjagadēkamallavīrapāṇḍyadēvargge Uccaṁgināḍāḷva daṁ
ḍanāyakaṁgajēyarāyapāṁḍyadēvargge puṇyavakkuvendu binnapaṁ geyyalu
vīrapāṇḍyadēvaru pulvaḷḷūra śivabrāhmaṇanuyyakoṇḍabhaṭṭara kālaṁ karcci dhārā
pūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . Alliyāsthānadalu rāyapāṁḍyadēvarggaṁ sōvala
dēviyarggaṁ puṇyavakkuvendu Uccaṁgiya kōṭeya teṁkaṇa Arasanakeṟeya keḷagaṇa nīrmmaṇnuḷḷanitu
gaddeyumaṁ Ā keṟeya mūḍaṇa padinaydu mattaru beddaleyumaṁ niccavaḷavōrvve brāhma
ṇaṁge Akki mā 5 hesaṟu mā 1 tuppa soḷasige 2 mosaru ba 1 Aḷe ba 1 Aḍake 2 Ele 4ṟa paḍiyalu naḍa
suvantāgi vēdapāragarappa padināṟu mānasa brāhmaṇarige cchatrakke biṭṭaru . Intī dharmmamanāvanōrvva pratipāḷisidaṁ
ge gaṁge gaye vāṇarāsi kurukṣētra mahārgghyatīrtthagaḷa taḍiyalsāyira liṁgapratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi sāyi
ra kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷalkaṭṭisi bēdapāragarappa sāyira sabrāhmaṇarige koṭṭa phaḷamakku .
Ī dharmmamanāvanōrvva kiḍisidavanā divyatīrtthaṁgaḷa taḍiyalsāyira liṁgamumaṁ sāyira kavileyumaṁ
sāyira sabrāhmaṇarumaṁ sāyira tapōdhanarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakamakku . ślōka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasahasrāṇāṁ miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © kallakeṟeya kalidēvara
sthānācāryyanappa gōṇiyajīyaru dēvadānada mākeṟeyalu dēvālyada nelanoḷagāgi baḍagaloṁdu mattaru beddaleyuma mūnūṟu
kamma gaddeyanu noyyēśvaradēvarige biṭṭaru . dēvarapuravarada mane hanneraḍumaṁ biṭṭaru ©
Digital edition of SII 9.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
